name: pactscene
description: A schema-first AI scene workbench framework for safely connecting natural language to existing business screens.

scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @pactscene/demo-web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @pactscene/core && npm run build --workspace @pactscene/input && npm run build --workspace @pactscene/react-runtime
scripts.dev: npm run generate && npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @pactscene/demo-web -- --host 127.0.0.1
